name: ReminderConfig
description: One doc per organization (doc id == org_id), controlling due-date email reminders. Read by the scheduled Cloud Function in functions/index.js.

offsets_days.description: Days before due_date to send a reminder. 0 = on the due date itself. E.g. [3, 1, 0].

send_hour_utc.description: Hour of day (UTC, 0-23) the daily reminder check runs at for this org.
